body_txt: A Hostile Show Takeover is when a character in a series briefly takes over the role of main character, but not in the " A Day in the Limelight " sense. Rather, a character has forcibly taken over the series for themself. Most frequent in cartoons. To count as this trope, it usually requires the character taking over to be ready with a new series name, logo, theme song variant , or Special Edition Title to replace the ones referring to the "former" main character, and thus the characters need to be aware they're in a show , at least for that episode. However, the trope can occur without Breaking the Fourth Wall . For example, if a character takes over the setting of the series and the new theme song plays without anyone directly commenting on it, it's still this trope. Usually, we don't ever see the actual main characters take the series back , especially if the takeover is anything more than a quick gag; the actual leads just return to their position via the Snap Back . Hopefully, we won't have to deal with this here. Waluigi once tried to take over this page, and we had to send him elsewhere . He might be still lurking around here, though.
